name: externalsources
context_prose:
Scoped slice of [c3-engram-cli-binary.md](c3-engram-cli-binary.md): the L3 edges that touch E25. The DI back-edge (D4) decomposes into the per-dependency Dependency Manifest below — each injected function is wired by E21 · cli at the `externalsources.Discover` call site.

E25 reads four kinds of files (CLAUDE.md hierarchy, .claude/rules, auto memory, skill SKILL.md) plus transitive @import expansions. All filesystem effects flow through injected adapters; the package itself never calls `os.*`, `runtime.*`, or `filepath.WalkDir` directly.

properties.name: CLAUDE.md ancestor walk
properties.statement: For all start directories `cwd`, `DiscoverClaudeMd` visits each ancestor from `cwd` to the filesystem root and includes every `CLAUDE.md` and `CLAUDE.local.md` for which `StatFn` reports existence.

properties.name: Stat errors silently skipped
properties.statement: For all stat results, `DiscoverClaudeMd` ignores any error returned by `StatFn` (treating it as `not exists`) and never propagates it to the caller.

properties.name: Empty home skips user scope
properties.statement: For all calls to `DiscoverClaudeMd` where `home == ""`, no `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` candidate is stat-ed and no user-scope entry appears in the result.

properties.name: Managed-policy path is OS-specific
properties.statement: For `goos` in {`darwin`, `linux`, `windows`}, `ManagedPolicyPath(goos)` returns the documented system-wide CLAUDE.md path; for any other value it returns `""` and `DiscoverClaudeMd` adds no managed-policy entry.

properties.name: Imports depth-capped at 5
properties.statement: For all import graphs, `ExpandImports` enqueues no node at depth ≥ 5; transitive `@`-imports beyond five hops from the start file are never returned.

properties.name: Import cycles broken
properties.statement: For all import graphs containing a cycle, `ExpandImports` returns each distinct file at most once and terminates.
properties.notes: Visited map seeded with `startPath` so the start file is not re-emitted.

properties.name: Relative imports resolved against containing file
properties.statement: For all `@target` references where `target` does not start with `/` or `~`, the resolved path is `filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(containingFile), target)`; absolute and `~`-rooted paths are returned unchanged.

properties.name: Reader errors skipped silently
properties.statement: For all import-expansion `Reader` calls returning a non-nil error or nil body, `ExpandImports` skips that node without aborting; remaining queue items are still processed.

properties.name: Imports deduplicated across ancestors
properties.statement: For all `Discover` invocations, every imported file path appears at most once in the returned slice even when multiple CLAUDE.md ancestors transitively import it.

properties.name: Rules without paths-frontmatter always included
properties.statement: For all rule files where `ParseFrontmatter` yields an empty `Paths` slice, `DiscoverRules` includes the file unconditionally; rules with a non-empty `paths:` list are included only when `MatchAny` returns true for that list.

properties.name: Auto-memory resolution precedence
properties.statement: For all `DiscoverAutoMemory` calls, the resolved directory is the first of (1) the `Settings`-supplied directory when found and non-empty AND it has files, (2) `cwdProjectDir` when it has files, (3) `mainProjectDir` when set, non-empty, and distinct from `cwdProjectDir`.

properties.name: Auto-memory only includes *.md files
properties.statement: For all entries returned by `DirLister`, `DiscoverAutoMemory` includes only those with `filepath.Ext(path) == ".md"` as `KindAutoMemory` files.

properties.name: Empty result is normal
properties.statement: For all `DiscoverAutoMemory` calls where no resolution step yields any files, the returned slice is empty (length 0) and no error is surfaced.

properties.name: Skill discovery roots
properties.statement: For all `DiscoverSkills` calls, `SkillFinder` is invoked on `<cwd>/.claude/skills` always, and additionally on `<home>/.claude/skills` and `<home>/.claude/plugins/cache` only when `home != ""`.

properties.name: ProjectSlug substitution
properties.statement: For all absolute paths P, `ProjectSlug(P)` equals `strings.ReplaceAll(P, "/", "-")`; matches Claude Code's `~/.claude/projects/<slug>/` directory layout.

properties.name: FileCache memoizes content and errors
properties.statement: For all paths P, `FileCache.Read(P)` invokes the underlying `ReaderFunc` at most once across the lifetime of a single `FileCache`; subsequent calls return the cached `(content, err)` pair, including cached errors.

properties.name: Frontmatter parser fence requirement
properties.statement:
For all bodies that do not begin with `---
` or that lack a closing `
---
` fence, `ParseFrontmatter` returns a zero-value `Frontmatter` and the original body bytes unchanged.

properties.name: Frontmatter recognized keys
properties.statement: For all YAML blocks, `ParseFrontmatter` populates only the `name`, `description` (scalar or `>` folded), and `paths` (`- item` list) keys; all other keys are silently ignored.

properties.name: Discover ordering
properties.statement: For all `Discover` calls, the returned slice is the concatenation, in order, of CLAUDE.md ancestors → expanded imports → rules → auto memory → skills.
properties.notes: Ordering here does NOT determine recall phase priority — that is set by recall/orchestrate.

properties.name: Kinds are exhaustively stringified
properties.statement: For all `Kind` values defined in this package (`KindClaudeMd`, `KindRules`, `KindAutoMemory`, `KindSkill`, `KindUnknown`), `Kind.String()` returns the documented lowercase identifier; any other int value returns `"invalid"`.

properties.name: No direct I/O (DI-only)
properties.statement: For all package code under `internal/externalsources/`, no symbol references `os.*`, `runtime.*`, `filepath.WalkDir`, `filepath.Glob`, or any other process/OS facility directly; all such effects flow through the injected `StatFn`, `Reader`, `MdWalker`, `MatchAny`, `Settings`, `DirLister`, `SkillFinder` adapters wired by E21 · cli.
properties.notes: Architectural invariant from project DI rule (CLAUDE.md "DI everywhere"). No automated guard; would need an import-scanner test.
